goal_text:
You want to book a 'taxi'. The taxi should 'arrive by 10:45' and should go to 'curry garden'.
The taxi should depart from 'lan hong house'.
Make sure you get 'car type' and 'contact number'.

message: You want to book a taxi. The taxi should arrive by 10:45 and should go to curry garden
The taxi should depart from lan hong house
Make sure you get car type and contact number
